mapper.select: select ts.id, ts.task_id, t.name as task_name, ts.user_id, u.real_name as user_name, ts.work_date, ts.hours, ts.cost_rate, ts.labor_cost, ts.description, ts.status from timesheet ts left join project_task t on t.id = ts.task_id left join sys_user u on u.id = ts.user_id where ts.id = #{id} and ts.is_deleted = 0
select id, project_id, task_id, user_id, work_date, hours, cost_rate, labor_cost, description, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from timesheet where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update timesheet set task_id = #{taskId}, work_date = #{workDate}, hours = #{hours}, cost_rate = #{costRate}, labor_cost = #{laborCost}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id} and project_id = #{projectId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(hours), 0) from timesheet where project_id = #{projectId} and is_deleted = 0
select coalesce(sum(labor_cost), 0) from timesheet where project_id = #{projectId} and is_deleted = 0
select count(distinct user_id) from timesheet where project_id = #{projectId} and is_deleted = 0
